title: Access Permissions
description: An exact rule-driven system in which administrators may edit and editors may view.

tokens.label: Administrator
tokens.description: The observation that the user is an administrator.

tokens.label: Always-present token
tokens.description: The distinguished token present in every state.

tokens.label: May edit
tokens.description: The observation that the user has permission to edit.

tokens.label: May view
tokens.description: The observation that the user has permission to view.
